--- iter 4 bash --- $ reach-fuzz forms --base http://127.0.0.1:9139 [reach-fuzz forms] http://127.0.0.1:9139 form#0 -> POST http://127.0.0.1:9139/login fields=['username', 'password', 'submit'] [200] len=1845 text/html; charset=utf http://127.0.0.1:9139/login (diff vs GET: len 1706->1845) --- iter 5 bash --- $ python3 - <<'PY' import requests,re,hashlib,random,string base='http://127.0.0.1:9139' s=requests.Session() u='u'+''.join(random.choice(string.ascii_lowercase+string.digits) for _ in range(8)); p='Passw0rd!' for path in ['/register','/login']: r=s.get(base+path) print('GET',path,r.status_code,len(r.text),r.url) # register with submit r=s.post(base+'/register',data={'username':u,'password':p,'confirm_password':p,'submit':'Sign Up'},allow_redirects=False) print('POST /register',r.status_code,len(r.text),'loc',r.headers.get('Location'),'cookies',s.cookies.get_dict()) print(r.text[:1000]) if r.is_redirect: rr=s.get(base+r.headers['Location']) print('FOLLOW',rr.url,rr.status_code,len(rr.text),'cookies',s.cookies.get_dict()) print(rr.text[:2000]) r=s.post(base+'/login',data={'username':u,'password':p,'submit':'Login'},allow_redirects=False) print('POST /login',r.status_code,len(r.text),'loc',r.headers.get('Location'),'cookies',s.cookies.get_dict()) print(r.text[:1000]) if r.is_redirect: rr=s.get(base+r.headers['Location']) print('FOLLOW',rr.url,rr.status_code,len(rr.text),'cookies',s.cookies.get_dict()) text=rr.text print(text[:5000]) print('LINKS',re.findall(r'href=["\']([^"\']+)',text)) print('FORMS',re.findall(r']+>',text,re.I)) print('SCRIPTS',re.findall(r'src=["\']([^"\']+)',text)) print('USER',u,p) PY GET /register 200 1996 http://127.0.0.1:9139/register GET /login 200 1706 http://127.0.0.1:9139/login POST /register 302 189 loc / cookies {'session': 'eyJfZmxhc2hlcyI6W3siIHQiOlsic3VjY2VzcyIsIlJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbiBzdWNjZXNzZnVsISJdfV19.ajbs2A.RzFIlcW_b-TkG7un5oyWANFNEeU'} Redirecting...
